title: rhinanthus glaber subsp. minor
intro: Rhinanthus glaber subsp. minor, also known as the lesser yellow rattle, is a perennial plant species belonging to the broomrape family (Orobanchaceae). This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its use as an expectorant and a treatment for respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its ability to thin mucus and promote coughing. The health benefits of Rhinanthus glaber subsp. minor include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of colds, flu, and allergies. Rhinanthus glaber subsp. minor can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used in traditional folk medicine to treat respiratory issues and promote overall well-being.
